ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tile_matrices" (
  "matrix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tile matrix */,
  "zoom_level" INTEGER /* Zoom level of the tile matrix */,
  "tile_width" INTEGER /* Width of each tile in pixels */,
  "tile_height" INTEGER /* Height of each tile in pixels */,
  "matrix_width" INTEGER /* Width of the tile matrix in tiles */,
  "matrix_height" INTEGER /* Height of the tile matrix in tiles */,
  "scale" REAL /* Scale of the tile matrix */,
  "cell_size" REAL /* Cell size of the tile matrix */,
  "point_of_origin" TEXT /* Point of origin for the tile matrix */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tile matrix was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the tile matrix was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matrix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., satellite imagery, topographic map) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dataset updates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License or terms of use for the dataset */,
  "attribution" TEXT /* Attribution information for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_datasets_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, private) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "license" TEXT /* License or terms of use for the data */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tiles" (
  "tile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tile */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tile belongs to */,
  "matrix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tile matrix */,
  "tile_x" INTEGER /* X coordinate of the tile */,
  "tile_y" INTEGER /* Y coordinate of the tile */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the tile image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the tile file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the tile was uploaded */,
  "tile_status" TEXT /* Status of the tile (e.g., available, processing, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tiles_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tiles_matrix_id FOREIGN KEY ("matrix_id") REFERENCES tile_matrices ("matrix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_overlays" (
  "overlay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data overlay */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the overlay belongs to */,
  "overlay_name" TEXT /* Name of the overlay */,
  "overlay_type" TEXT /* Type of the overlay (e.g., vector, raster) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the overlay data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the overlay file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the overlay was uploaded */,
  "overlay_status" TEXT /* Status of the overlay (e.g., available, processing, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overlay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_overlays_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial query */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the query was performed on */,
  "query_name" TEXT /* Name of the query */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of the query (e.g., intersection, union) */,
  "query_description" TEXT /* Description of the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the query was performed */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the query result */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., completed, running, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_queries_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "overlay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data overlay */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data overlay */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_overlay_id FOREIGN KEY ("overlay_id") REFERENCES data_overlays ("overlay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the comment is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the rating is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text review accompanying the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ratings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag is for */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the category is for */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_categories_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
